sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data available in sources

special_mechanics.name: Superhuman Jump Height
special_mechanics.description: Players can jump extremely high, enabling slam dunks that defy realistic physics

special_mechanics.name: On Fire Mode
special_mechanics.description: After three consecutive baskets, character gains unlimited turbo boost and increased shooting precision. Continues until opposing team scores or player scores four additional consecutive baskets while on fire

special_mechanics.name: Super Clean Floors (Easter Egg)
special_mechanics.description: Characters fall if running too fast or changing direction too quickly

physics_values.activation: Press A 5x and right 5x on Genesis controller
physics_values.effect: speed and direction change penalties applied

tier_notes: T2 empirical/qualitative data. No precise physics parameters documented in available sources. Game emphasizes exaggerated arcade gameplay over realistic physics simulation.
